results.title: Insulin autoimmune syndrome: Three case reports.
results.abstract: Insulin autoimmune syndrome (IAS) is a rare endocrine disease characterized by repeated fasting hypoglycemia or episodes of hypoglycemia late after meals, elevated serum insulin, and positivity for insulin autoantibody (IAA) or insulin receptor antibody (IRA). We summarize the clinical manifestations and treatment experiences of 3 patients with IAS.

results.title: Insulin therapy in type 2 diabetes.
results.abstract: To review the increasingly common use of insulin therapy in patients with type 2 diabetes and the practical aspects of initiating insulin therapy in these patients.
results.journal: Journal of the American Pharmaceutical Association (Washington, D.C. : 1996)
